questions.question: A conveyor belt is operating at a very high speed. What is the most likely outcome?

explanations.a: Correct. Increasing belt speed reduces the time required to transport products.
explanations.b: Incorrect. Higher speed decreases transport time.
explanations.c: Incorrect. High speed does not automatically stop the motor.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Belt speed does not affect load weight.

questions.question: What is likely to happen when load weight is increased significantly?

explanations.a: Correct. Higher loads require more motor effort, increasing temperature.
explanations.b: Incorrect. Load weight does not affect conveyor length.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Sensors are independent of load weight.

questions.question: Which parameter directly affects product transport time?

explanations.a: Correct. Transport time depends on conveyor speed and length.
explanations.b: Incorrect. Sensor color has no effect.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Controller brand does not directly affect transport time.

questions.question: Why is conveyor efficiency reduced under excessive load conditions?

explanations.a: Correct. Heavy loads increase stress and energy requirements.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Load does not reduce conveyor length.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Dashboard cards do not affect efficiency.

questions.question: What is the purpose of an industrial dashboard in conveyor automation?

explanations.a: Correct. Dashboards display real-time operational information.
explanations.b: Incorrect. The conveyor belt transports products.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Dashboards do not perform mechanical functions.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Conveyor length is a design parameter.

questions.question: Which Industry 4.0 feature enables real-time conveyor monitoring?

explanations.a: Correct. IoT enables real-time monitoring and data collection.
explanations.b: Incorrect. Manual registers are not real-time systems.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Paper logs cannot provide live monitoring.

questions.question: What is the likely effect of extremely high motor RPM?

explanations.a: Correct. Higher RPM generally increases power consumption and heat generation.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Conveyor movement continues unless a fault occurs.
explanations.d: Incorrect. RPM significantly affects system behavior.

questions.question: What is the benefit of conveyor automation compared to manual transportation?

explanations.a: Correct. Automation improves efficiency and throughput.

questions.question: Which output parameter indicates the health of conveyor operation?

explanations.a: Correct. Efficiency reflects system performance and effectiveness.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Monitor size does not affect conveyor health.

questions.question: After completing this experiment, what concept should students understand best?

explanations.a: Correct. The experiment focuses on conveyor automation systems and smart manufacturing.
explanations.b: Incorrect. Mobile game development is unrelated.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Marketing is outside the experiment scope.
